name: Performance Optimization
description: Profile, identify bottlenecks, and optimize application performance — backend, database, and frontend

steps.name: Establish Baseline Metrics
steps.description: Run benchmarks, load tests, and profiling on the current system. Record p50, p95, p99 latencies, throughput, memory usage, and CPU utilization. Document the current state before touching anything.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Baseline performance metrics recorded: response times, throughput, memory, CPU under load

steps.name: Profile the Hot Paths
steps.description: Use profiling tools to find where the app actually spends time. Focus on the top 3 slowest operations. Check for N+1 queries, slow DB calls, blocking I/O, and unnecessary computation.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Top bottlenecks identified with profiler evidence, not guesses — specific functions, queries, or paths named

steps.name: Database Optimization
steps.description: Analyze slow query logs, check EXPLAIN plans, add missing indexes, fix N+1 queries, batch operations, and optimize schema if needed. Check connection pool sizing.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Slow queries optimized, indexes added, N+1 issues resolved, connection pool tuned

steps.name: Application-Level Optimization
steps.description: Fix computational bottlenecks: replace O(n²) with O(n), add caching for expensive repeated operations, reduce allocations in hot loops, and parallelize independent work.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Hot path code optimized, caching added where appropriate, algorithmic improvements applied

steps.name: Frontend & Network Optimization
steps.description: Reduce bundle size, add lazy loading, optimize images, enable compression, add CDN caching headers, and remove render-blocking resources. Run Lighthouse audit.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Lighthouse score improved, bundle size reduced, key resources lazy-loaded, caching headers set

steps.name: Verify Improvements
steps.description: Re-run the same benchmarks from step 1 against the same load. Compare before/after. Confirm improvements are real and no regressions were introduced.
steps.acceptance_criteria: Before/after comparison documented, target improvements met, full test suite still passing
